E-Transformation & Solutions

Cash Management Hub

Manage Bank Hub, e-Collection, MT940 reconciliation directly within your business software.
e-Government Series

Install fully compliant e-Invoice and e-Ledger solutions naturally on your accounting system.
e-Commerce & Marketplace

Manage Shopify and marketplace orders, including payment and commission flows.
E-Collection Platform

Collect secure online payments from customers and dealers in seconds.
E-Statement & Open Banking

Open Banking solution that manages all bank accounts from a single panel.
E-POS Tracking & Reporting

Reporting solution that manages physical and virtual POS movements from a single panel.
E-DBS System

Manage your multi-bank Direct Debit System processes from a single panel.
E-Payment (Bulk)

Securely send your bulk payments to all banks simultaneously.
E-Cash Flow

Financial visibility and AI-powered cash forecasting platform.

Financial Transformation with eny

Transform your costly manual banking and accounting operations end-to-end with our high-performance platform.

OUR PHILOSOPHY

Not consulting.
Architecture.

We are not just a software vendor; we are a strategic partner building your business's financial future.

Why Are We Different?

While junior teams manage your project in classic consulting firms, at eny, you work directly with senior experts with at least 10 years of experience.

We identify bottlenecks, find the most efficient solution path using the "best practice" approach, and reveal the true potential of your business. We combine financial engineering with deep system expertise.

  • check_circle Domain Expertise (Finance Only)
  • check_circle Boutique & Agile Approach
  • check_circle Full Transparency and Proactive Communication
star

15+ Years

Enterprise System Expertise

public

Global Impact

40+ Enterprise Projects, 5 Continents

format_quote

08 · DATA SOVEREIGNTY

"As corporate systems become increasingly interconnected and AI capabilities require access to sensitive operational data, the question of where data resides and who controls it has moved from IT policy to board-level risk management. GDPR, KVKK, and evolving data sovereignty requirements across multiple jurisdictions impose strict boundaries on data residency and processing. Enterprise system architecture, when implemented with deliberate design, provides robust data sovereignty controls: on-premise and private cloud options for organizations where public cloud is not viable, API-first integration patterns that prevent vendor lock-in, and role-based access architectures that ensure data access is always intentional. eny's approach to data sovereignty is built on a simple principle: the systems we build must serve the organization — not the other way around. Every architectural decision is weighed against the long-term question of control: your data, your rules, your terms."

architecture

eny Insight Series

Financial Architecture Vision
TECHNOLOGY INFRASTRUCTURE

Strong Ecosystem, Single Architecture

In our projects, we utilize not only our deep system knowledge but also the power of the massive financial technology ecosystem behind us. Our partnerships with payment infrastructures directly integrated with 29 banks and e-Transformation centers turn your enterprise technology projects into end-to-end payment systems that are not dependent on external sources from day one, rather than incompatible pieces tried to be integrated later.

Our Expertise Map

Senior Financial System Architect

Joined eny: 2011

  • verified ERP Financial Accounting Certification
  • verified ERP Management Accounting Certification

Expertise & Projects

Global Roll-out, Profit Center Accounting, TMS 29 Inflation Accounting, 15+ Holding consolidation projects.

Treasury & Cash Management Lead

Joined eny: 2015

  • verified ERP Treasury and Risk Management Certification
  • verified ERP Cash Management Certification

Expertise & Projects

Hedge Mechanisms, Cash Flow Platforms, Bank Integration Hub architectures (TÖS, e-DBS).

e-Transformation & AI Solutions Lead

Joined eny: 2019

  • verified Platform Integration Suite Certification
  • verified Document Reporting Compliance (DRC)

Expertise & Projects

AI integration, process automation, end-to-end e-Invoice and e-Ledger solutions architecture.

Senior IFRS/UFRS Expert

Joined eny: 2012

  • verified Capital Markets Board Audit License
  • verified IFRS/UFRS Reporting Expertise

Expertise & Projects

Multi-standard reporting, Modern ERP New GL IFRS migrations, parallel ledgers, and TAS/IFRS compliance projects.

Our Journey

2003

E-Commerce and Loyalty Systems

High-volume e-commerce infrastructures and customer loyalty programs were designed for leading brands in Turkey.

2010

Laying the Foundations

eny was founded with the goal of deep specialization in ERP Financial applications. We adopted the principle of "doing what we know best, in the best possible way."

2015

Real Estate Portfolio Management & Localization Packages

Sector-specific leasing scenarios and e-Transformation packages fully compliant with Turkish legislation were deployed.

2020

Global Expansion

We successfully completed our first international projects in Europe and the Middle East. We carried our vision of building the System-Finance bridge to the international arena.

Today

AI & Next Gen Solutions

We continue to redefine financial architecture with our next-gen cloud systems, artificial intelligence integrations, and e-Transformation solutions.
